## 🐛 Bug Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of what the bug is. -->

## 📍 Steps to Reproduce
<!-- Steps to reproduce the behavior. -->
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## 🎯 Expected Behavior
<!-- A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen. -->

## 📱 Current Behavior
<!-- A clear and concise description of what actually happened. -->
- Screenshots: <!-- Add screenshots if applicable -->
- Error messages: <!-- Copy any error messages -->

## 🌍 Environment Information
<!-- Please complete the following information. -->
- **Device**: <!-- e.g., iPhone 12, Samsung Galaxy S21 -->
- **Operating System**: <!-- e.g., iOS 14.7, Android 11 -->
- **Browser**: <!-- e.g., Chrome 91.0.4472.124, Safari 14.1.1 -->
- **App Version**: <!-- e.g., v1.2.3 -->
- **Language**: <!-- Hindi/English -->

## 📋 Additional Context
<!-- Add any other context about the problem here. -->

## 🔍 Debug Information
<!-- If you have any debug information, please include it. -->
- Console logs: <!-- Copy console logs -->
- Network requests: <!-- Copy network request logs -->
- State information: <!-- Any relevant state information -->

## 🎨 UI/UX Impact
<!-- How does this bug affect the user experience? -->
- **Severity**: Low/Medium/High/Critical
- **User Impact**: <!-- Describe impact on users -->
- **Workaround**: <!-- Is there a workaround? -->

## 🌐 Language Specific Issues
<!-- Is this issue specific to Hindi or English? -->

- **English**: <!-- English-specific issues -->

## 🙏 Thank You!

Thank you for taking the time to report this bug! Your contribution helps us improve SarkariSaathi for everyone.

**हिंदी में**: इस बग की रिपोर्ट करने के लिए समय निकालने के लिए धन्यवाद! आपका योगदान हमें SarkariSaathi को हर किसी के लिए बेहतर बनाने में मदद करता है।
